data.title: INVO Fertility Addresses Nasdaq Compliance Notice and Disclosure
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from INVO Fertility ( (IVF) ).

On April 23, 2026, INVO Fertility, Inc. received a Nasdaq notice that it was not in compliance with listing rules after failing to timely file its Form 10‑K for the year ended Dec. 31, 2025, a delay the company attributed to the need for additional review of complex tax, warrant, and variable interest entity accounting. The notification does not immediately affect the listing or trading of INVO’s common stock under the ticker IVF, and the company has 60 days to submit a compliance plan and potentially up to 180 days from the report’s due date to regain compliance, with an appeals process available if its plan is rejected.

On April 29, 2026, INVO publicly disclosed the Nasdaq deficiency notice, emphasizing that it is working diligently to complete and file the overdue annual report as promptly as possible, a step that will be closely watched by investors given the implications of sustained non‑compliance for its Nasdaq listing and overall market standing.

The most recent analyst rating on (IVF) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on INVO Fertility stock, see the IVF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IVF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IVF is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (persistent losses, declining gross margin, and negative operating/free cash flow). Technicals are only mildly supportive, while valuation lacks support due to negative earnings and no dividend data. Corporate events are mixed—growth initiatives and financing help, but dilution risk and the reverse split temper the upside.

To see Spark’s full report on IVF stock, click here.

More about INVO Fertility

INVO Fertility, Inc. is a healthcare services fertility company focused on expanding access to assisted reproductive technology by building, acquiring, and operating fertility clinics in the U.S. Its strategy centers on “INVO Centers” that offer the intravaginal culture procedure enabled by the proprietary INVOcell medical device, alongside profitable IVF clinics and third‑party distribution of INVOcell.

The company currently operates four fertility clinics in the United States and positions the INVOcell‑enabled intravaginal culture procedure as a more intimate and affordable alternative to traditional IVF, which it believes can deliver comparable results at a fraction of the cost and superior effectiveness to intrauterine insemination, targeting patients seeking lower‑cost advanced reproductive care.

Average Trading Volume: 97,211

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.3M

Find detailed analytics on IVF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Independent Bank Highlights Strategy in New Investor Outreach
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Independent Bank ( (IBCP) ) is now available.

Independent Bank Corporation plans to meet one-on-one with institutional investors and analysts at conferences in April and May 2026, where senior executives, including CEO William B. Kessel and CFO Gavin A. Mohr, will outline the bank’s strategy and recent financial performance. The company has posted its accompanying investor presentation on its website, reinforcing that it uses regulatory filings, press releases, and its online investor relations hub as primary channels for material disclosures.

The presentation highlights a franchise built on low-cost deposits, exceptional credit quality, and a diverse loan portfolio spanning commercial, consumer, and mortgage segments, supported by a long-standing indirect lending program in marine, RV, and power sports. With strong positions in multiple Michigan markets, rising deposits per branch, and continued investment in talent and higher-growth regions, the outreach underscores Independent Bank’s effort to deepen engagement with the institutional market and showcase its growth and earnings trajectory to prospective and existing shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (IBCP) stock is a Hold with a $37.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Independent Bank stock, see the IBCP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IBCP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IBCP is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial fundamentals (growth and balance-sheet deleveraging) and a favorable valuation (low P/E and solid dividend). Earnings-call tone and guidance were supportive, though near-term expense pressure and a localized credit uptick add risk. Technicals are the main drag, with the stock trading below key moving averages and soft momentum signals.

To see Spark’s full report on IBCP stock, click here.

More about Independent Bank

Independent Bank Corporation is a Michigan-based, state-chartered, Fed member financial institution founded in 1864, with $5.6 billion in assets and more than 57 branches across the state’s lower peninsula. The bank serves over 200,000 customers with a diversified mix of commercial, consumer, and mortgage lending, and holds the top deposit market share among Michigan-headquartered banks, underpinned by a low-cost deposit base and strong credit quality.

Headquartered in Grand Rapids, Independent Bank has built a highly profitable franchise with over 800 employees and a growing presence in key Michigan markets, including top-10 deposit market share in most counties where it operates. The lender has posted 12 consecutive years of dividend increases and expanded average deposits per branch from $25 million in 2011 to $80 million in 2025, supported by non-interest income that has averaged 28% of total revenue over the past decade.

City Holding Company ( (CHCO) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 29, 2026, City Holding Company announced that Michael “Tim” T. Quinlan Jr., previously executive vice president of retail banking, assumed the role of president of City National Bank of West Virginia at the close of business that day. Quinlan, who has served in his executive vice president role since January 2021, will receive a base salary and executive benefits aligned with the bank’s existing executive compensation practices.

Concurrently on April 29, 2026, longtime executive Charles “Skip” R. Hageboeck stepped down as president of City National Bank but retained his positions as chief executive officer of the bank and president and chief executive officer of City Holding Company. His employment agreement was formally amended to remove references to his service as president of City National, underscoring a targeted leadership realignment while maintaining continuity at the CEO level for stakeholders.

First Majestic Silver ( (TSE:AG) ) has shared an update.

First Majestic Silver Corp. has called its 2026 annual general meeting of shareholders for June 10, 2026, in Vancouver, with an April 15, 2026 record date determining voting eligibility. Shareholders will review the audited financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025, consider board and auditor appointments, vote on executive compensation, and approve items under the company’s long-term incentive plan, reinforcing standard governance and pay practices.

The agenda includes setting the board size at six directors, electing directors until the next annual meeting, and reappointing Deloitte LLP as auditor with board authority over its remuneration. data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Willow Lane Acquisition Corporation Class A ( (WLAC) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 29, 2026, Willow Lane Acquisition Corp. reported that, as of the April 28 redemption deadline, it had received no redemption requests from holders of its Class A public shares ahead of its proposed business combination with Boost Run Holdings, LLC. The absence of redemptions implies that approximately $133.8 million in cash and cash equivalents held in Willow Lane’s trust account is expected to be available to the combined company at closing, signaling strong shareholder support.

Willow Lane has scheduled an extraordinary general meeting for April 30, 2026, for shareholders of record as of March 12, 2026, to vote on proposals related to the Boost Run transaction, which remains subject to customary shareholder and regulatory approvals. If those conditions are satisfied or waived, the business combination is expected to close shortly afterward, positioning Boost Run to access substantial capital to advance its AI-focused cloud infrastructure platform and potentially strengthening its competitive standing in the high-performance computing market.

The most recent analyst rating on (WLAC) stock is a Buy with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Willow Lane Acquisition Corporation Class A stock, see the WLAC Stock Forecast page.

More about Willow Lane Acquisition Corporation Class A

Willow Lane Acquisition Corp. is a New York–based special purpose acquisition company formed to pursue mergers, share exchanges, asset acquisitions or similar business combinations with one or more businesses. Its management team brings broad operating, investing, financial and transactional experience, having previously identified and closed five SPAC deals aimed at creating shareholder value.

Boost Run is a cloud infrastructure provider focused on enterprise AI and high-performance computing workloads, offering GPU compute, CPU nodes, managed Kubernetes orchestration and shared storage. Its platform enables organizations to scale resources across thousands of nodes in minutes, and it operates under SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, ISO 27001 and ISO 27701 certifications while partnering with data centers that meet equivalent security and compliance standards.

Itau Unibanco ( (ITUB) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Itaú Unibanco held an exclusively online Extraordinary General Stockholders’ Meeting that approved, with virtually unanimous votes, the merger of its subsidiary Banco Itaucard S.A. into the holding company based on a base date of December 31, 2025. Shareholders also ratified the appointment of PwC as the appraiser, endorsed the related appraisal report and authorized management to implement the transaction, signaling a move to streamline the group’s structure and potentially enhance operational efficiency.

At the same meeting, investors approved amendments to the company’s bylaws to update the description of subscribed and paid-in capital and to increase the maximum number of executive officers to 60 members, reflecting Itaú Unibanco’s need for a broader leadership structure as it grows. The consolidation of the bylaws to capture these changes passed with 100% support of the voting shares represented, underscoring strong shareholder alignment with management’s strategic and governance agenda.

Edenor SA ( (EDN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Edenor reported early tender results for its cash tender offer targeting its 9.75% Senior Notes due 2030, originally capped at US$150 million out of US$475 million outstanding. Strong demand led the company to raise the tender cap to US$175 million, signaling active liability management and investor appetite for early repurchase at a premium.

By the early tender deadline, holders had tendered about US$270.4 million, of which US$175 million was accepted for purchase at US$1,020 per US$1,000 in principal plus accrued interest, with the oversubscribed offer settled on a prorated basis. The withdrawal period closed on April 28, 2026, an early settlement was slated for April 30, 2026, and no final settlement date was planned, underscoring Edenor’s prompt execution of its debt reduction plan.

data.title: Banco Santander Chile Files 2025 Audited Financials With Clean Opinion
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Banco Santander Chile ( (BSAC) ) has issued an announcement.

Banco Santander Chile has filed its April 2026 report as a foreign issuer in the U.S., disclosing that its consolidated financial statements for the years ended December 31, 2025 and 2024 were audited under Chilean standards. The independent auditor’s report dated February 25, 2026 concludes that the 2025 accounts fairly present the group’s financial position and performance in accordance with rules set by Chile’s Financial Market Commission.

The audit identifies the bank’s information technology environment and its methodology for calculating allowances for credit risk on loans and customer receivables as key audit matters, reflecting the importance and complexity of these areas for the lender. data.title: Jyong Biotech Delays Annual 20-F (Yearly Report)
data.description:
Jyong Biotech Ltd. ( (MENS) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Jyong Biotech Ltd. has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying investors of a delay in submitting its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company stresses that this is a timing issue affecting its annual filing, not an indication of deeper regulatory non-compliance, and confirms that all other required reports over the past 12 months have been filed.

The company attributes the delay mainly to needing additional time to finalize its audited financial statements and related disclosures for the Form 20-F (Yearly Report). Management indicates that filing within the standard deadline would have required unreasonable effort or expense, suggesting that the audit and disclosure work is still ongoing but nearing completion.

Jyong Biotech says it expects to file the delayed Form 20-F (Yearly Report) no later than the 15th calendar day after the original due date. This timeline is in line with the grace period allowed under SEC rules when a Form 12b-25 is properly submitted, and it gives investors a near-term window for when the full annual report should become available.

The company does not anticipate any significant changes in its results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year based on the information currently available. However, it cautions that the final numbers could still change as its independent registered public accounting firm completes the audit, and it flags that all such expectations are forward-looking statements subject to the usual risks and uncertainties.

Jyong Biotech emphasizes its intention to complete the audit, finalize its disclosures and return to timely filing of future periodic reports with the SEC. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer and Chairwoman of the Board Fu-Feng Kuo, dated April 29, 2026, underscoring executive-level responsibility for the late filing and the remediation steps underway.

data.title: FDCTech Posts Record 2025 Results and Returns to Profitability
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

FDCTech ( (FDCT) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 22, 2026, FDCTech reported record results for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with revenue rising 29.8% to about $35 million and a swing back to profitability at $5.8 million in net income, reversing a small loss in 2024. Gross margin widened to 54.8%, operating income reached $6.1 million, and the company’s accumulated deficit was fully erased, leaving an accumulated surplus and lifting stockholders’ equity to $22.4 million, supported by stronger cash and working capital.

Growth was driven by a 24.6% increase in brokerage revenues and a more than tripling of technology and software sales, reflecting broad adoption of the Condor platform, while wealth management revenue held steady with over $530 million in client assets under advice. The October 29, 2025 acquisition of Seychelles-licensed Alchemy International Ltd. was immediately earnings-accretive, contributing around $6.3 million in net income and expanding FDCTech’s reach among offshore brokerages, high-frequency traders, and institutional clients, bolstering its balance sheet and reinforcing its positioning for a prospective uplisting to a national exchange.

Spark’s Take on FDCT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FDCT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved reported profitability and a low-leverage balance sheet, but it is held back materially by highly unfavorable and volatile cash flow (notably the ~-$41.0M 2025 outflow) and weaker long-term technical trend positioning. A very low P/E provides valuation support, partially offsetting the cash-flow and trend risks.

To see Spark’s full report on FDCT stock, click here.

More about FDCTech

FDCTech, Inc. is a diversified, regulatory‑grade financial technology infrastructure developer serving regulated and OTC brokerages, as well as proprietary and algorithmic trading firms across forex, stocks, commodities, indices, ETFs, precious metals, and other asset classes worldwide. The Irvine, California-based company pursues a growth strategy centered on acquiring and integrating small to mid-size legacy financial services firms, leveraging its proprietary Condor Trading Technology and liquidity solutions to enhance client execution and service capabilities.

Its client base spans offshore brokerages, high-frequency traders, and institutional investors, supported by regulated subsidiaries including Australian wealth manager AD Advisory Services and Seychelles-based securities dealer Alchemy International Ltd., giving FDCTech a broader global regulatory footprint in developed and emerging markets. This multi-segment model positions the company at the intersection of trading technology, brokerage services, and wealth management, with an emphasis on scalable infrastructure for future financial markets.

data.title: LXP Industrial Trust Posts Q1 Loss Amid Leasing Growth
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from LXP Industrial Trust ( (LXP) ) is now available.

LXP Industrial Trust reported first-quarter 2026 results on April 29, 2026, posting a net loss attributable to common shareholders of $1.9 million, or $0.03 per diluted share, versus a profit a year earlier, as revenues slipped to $85.9 million due primarily to property dispositions. Despite the loss, Adjusted Company FFO rose 2.6% to $0.80 per diluted share, same-store NOI increased 2.0%, and the REIT maintained shareholder returns with a $0.70 common dividend and a declared dividend on its Series C preferred stock.

Operationally, LXP extended a key lease at its 1.1 million-square-foot Greenville/Spartanburg facility through 2031, completed an additional 0.7 million square feet of leasing in the quarter and 1.4 million square feet shortly thereafter, achieving double-digit cash rent spreads that underscore strong logistics demand. The trust also commenced a 1.2 million-square-foot speculative development in Phoenix, advanced redevelopment projects in Orlando and Richmond, refinanced and repriced $850 million of unsecured credit facilities, and repurchased 325,000 shares, steps that collectively support its industrial growth pipeline and balance sheet flexibility.

On April 23, 2026, the company detailed these results via press releases, press and analyst calls, stock‑exchange filings, and a comprehensive factsheet, underscoring disciplined execution, strong free cash flow generation of $3.7 billion, and an expanding ecosystem of AI‑driven client collaborations and technology partnerships that reinforce its position in enterprise digital transformation, while issuing guidance for modest revenue growth and stable margins in FY27.
